payload.answer: Memory card created with normalized statement. Recommend clarification on: (1) full name/identity of Sam, (2) specific Goldman entity, (3) full name/identity of Bill Evans, (4) nature of 'likes' relationship (professional respect, personal preference, romantic interest, etc.)
